name: White Bikini Mediterranean Terrace
description: Honey blonde woman in white ruched bikini with tie-front at Mediterranean beach club terrace, pergola with bamboo roof creating dappled shadows, rocky cliff and blue sea background, vibrant travel aesthetic
input_prompt: honey blonde woman white ruched bikini tie front mediterranean terrace pergola bamboo dappled shadows cliff sea travel aesthetic

gpt-image-1.5.prompt:
A Mediterranean-style outdoor beach club terrace with wooden pergola beams and bamboo reed slat roofing overhead. Light gray stone patio flooring with a rough-textured white stucco wall on the left. Large black planter pots with tall dried brown palm fronds frame the scene.

A young woman in her early to mid 20s stands in a three-quarter turn to the camera with her weight shifted to one hip. She has golden tan skin with warm sun-kissed undertones and a smooth slight sheen on her shoulders. Her honey blonde hair with darker shadow root balayage extends past her shoulders in loose soft waves with a middle part, silky and catching the sunlight.

She has an oval face with a softly defined jawline, light greenish-blue hazel-teal almond-shaped eyes with direct eye contact and soft alluring intensity, natural arch brows, a straight nose with small button tip, and full plump lips in rosy-nude with a soft matte finish slightly parted.

She wears a white ruched bandeau bikini top with thin spaghetti straps, a center front tie-knot with dangling strings, and a keyhole cutout detail. Matching white bikini bottoms with high-cut leg and gathered fabric. Her hands rest on the side straps of her bikini bottoms.

A dainty chain necklace with small pendant, stacked beaded bracelets with white pearls and colorful beads on her right wrist, and gold rings complete her styling.

In the background, a steep rocky cliff with green scrub vegetation, glimpses of blue sea, beige patio umbrellas, and a vibrant clear azure blue sky.

Bright natural noon sunlight creates high contrast with dappled shadows from the bamboo roof on the ground. Vibrant saturated warm travel photography aesthetic.

No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture throughout.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: A young woman in her early 20s with golden tan sun-kissed skin and honey blonde balayage hair in loose soft waves stands at a Mediterranean beach club terrace. She has light greenish-blue hazel-teal eyes with direct eye contact and full plump rosy-nude lips slightly parted, wearing a white ruched bandeau bikini with center tie-knot and keyhole cutout and matching high-cut bottoms. Her hands rest on her bikini straps as she stands in a three-quarter turn with weight on one hip. A wooden pergola with bamboo roof creates dappled shadows overhead, with a rocky cliff, blue sea, and azure sky in the background. Dainty chain necklace and stacked beaded bracelets complete her look. Bright noon sunlight, high contrast, vibrant saturated warm travel lifestyle photography, photorealistic, not illustration.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman in her early to mid 20s with golden tan skin and honey blonde balayage hair stands at a Mediterranean beach club terrace. She has loose soft waves past her shoulders, light greenish-blue hazel-teal eyes with direct eye contact and soft allure, and full plump rosy-nude lips slightly parted. She wears a white ruched bandeau bikini with thin spaghetti straps, center front tie-knot with dangling strings, keyhole cutout, and matching high-cut bottoms. Her hands rest on her bikini bottom straps in a three-quarter turn pose with weight shifted to one hip. The terrace features a wooden pergola with bamboo roof creating dappled shadows, white stucco wall, dried palm fronds, with a rocky cliff, blue sea, and azure sky beyond. Bright noon sunlight, vibrant warm travel photography aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bikini color from white to coral pink while keeping the woman in the exact same three-quarter turn pose with her hands on her bikini straps. Preserve her golden tan skin, honey blonde balayage hair, jewelry, and the Mediterranean terrace setting with pergola and sea view.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed bikini construction (ruched, tie-knot, keyhole), precise environment elements (pergola, bamboo, stucco)
2_realism_anchors: 'dappled shadows from bamboo', 'rocky cliff texture', 'stucco wall', 'tie-knot detail', 'bracelet stack'
3_technical_camera: 'vibrant high saturation', 'sharp focus', 'deep DOF', 'warm travel aesthetic'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents overcast, flat lighting, indoor, dull colors
5_spatial_consistency: clear three-quarter turn with hand position on bikini straps
6_lighting_storytelling: 'bright noon sun dappled shadows' = vibrant Mediterranean vacation mood
7_environment_detail: specific Mediterranean architecture (pergola, bamboo, stucco, planters, dried palms)
